title: alnus glutinosa lusus badensis
intro: Alnus glutinosa lusus badensis, also known as Black Alder, is a variant of the European Alder tree (Alnus glutinosa), a deciduous tree native to Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alnus glutinosa lusus badensis include soothing respiratory issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
